text.title: Feedback Management Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure for applying feedback management end-to-end.

step.name: ingest
step.action: Pull from support / NPS / app-store / sales / social into ingest queue; preserve verbatim + source.
step.decision-gate: If a channel adapter fails > 24h, escalate before normalize step.

step.name: normalize
step.action: Map to canonical fields {source, date, user_id, segment, plan_tier, verbatim}; resolve user_id via CRM lookup.
step.decision-gate: If user_id resolution rate <80%, fix CRM linkage before triage.

step.name: classify
step.action: Run triage agent (haiku) over taxonomy v1; emit classification.taxonomy_path; reject items whose verbatim is too short to classify.
step.decision-gate: If classification confidence <0.6, route to human review queue.

step.name: rank-monthly
step.action: Compute weight = segment_arr × retention_risk × frequency; produce top-10 themes with verbatim citations.
step.output: Top-10 themes ready for monthly review.

step.name: dispose-and-close-loop
step.action: PM dispositions each (will-do / under-consideration / won't-do); will-do + under-consideration trigger close-loop email within 14 days.
step.decision-gate: If close_loop_sent_at not set within 14d, alert on dashboard.
